# victoriametrics_query_asset

## Purpose

Run a PromQL query against VictoriaMetrics's Prometheus-compatible API; emit the result as a Pandas DataFrame asset. Supports both query_range (default) and instant queries.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Output Dagster asset name. |
| `query` | `str` | PromQL query string. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `base_url_env_var` | `str` | `"VM_BASE_URL"` | Env var with VictoriaMetrics base URL. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"victoriametrics"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | — | — |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | — |
| `tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | — |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | — |
| `deps` | `List[str]` | — | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `query_range` | `bool` | `true` | If true (default), use /api/v1/query_range; else /api/v1/query (instant). |
| `range_lookback_minutes` | `int` | `60` | For query_range: lookback window from now (in minutes). |
| `step_seconds` | `int` | `60` | For query_range: PromQL step (seconds between samples). |
| `bearer_token_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with bearer token. |
| `request_timeout_seconds` | `int` | `60` | — |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.VictoriaMetricsQueryAssetComponent
attributes:
  asset_name: vm_request_rate_last_24h
  query: 'sum(rate(http_requests_total[5m])) by (service)'
  query_range: true
  range_lookback_minutes: 1440
  step_seconds: 60
  base_url_env_var: VM_BASE_URL
```
